svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="seq-normal" name="Normal Operation Sequence"> <mxGraphModel dx="-362" dy="-148" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Normal Operation Sequence" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="10" width="400" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_box" value="Linux Gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="50" width="150" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_line" value="" style="shape=line;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fillColor=none;rotation=90;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="290" width="10" height="435" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_box" value="MCU (STM32U575)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="50" width="150" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_line" value="" style="shape=line;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fillColor=none;rotation=90;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="290" width="10" height="435" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=1;exitY=0;entryX=0;entryY=0;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="130" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1l" value="[TCP:5001] SensorData (at configured Hz)" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="m1" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=1;exitY=0;entryX=0;entryY=0;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="200" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2l" value="[TCP:5001] HealthStatus (every 1 second)" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#d79b00;" parent="m2" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="195" y="280" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="280" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3l" value="[TCP:5000] ActuatorCommand" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="m3" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="330" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="330" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4l" value="[TCP:5000] ActuatorResponse" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="m4" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log" value="Log to
JSON file" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="380" width="80" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log_e" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="195" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="400" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wdg" value="Feed
watchdog" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="380" width="70" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wdg_e" style="rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="400" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="repeat" value="loop" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=5;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="110" width="740" height="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
